text_excerpt: Westminster Archives - David Anderson QC Lawyer London UK Skip to content Search for: Home Law Security Europe IRTL Archive Blog Media About Contact Watching the watchers – implementation stocktake Gallery Watching the watchers – implementation stocktake Watching the watchers – implementation stocktake The Home Secretary wrote to me today - just in time for my evidence session this afternoon before the Home Affairs Select Committee - setting out the terms for a new assignment. That will be a "stocktake" of the implementation by MI5 and Counter-Terrorism Policing of the 126 recommendations that came out of the post-attack reviews and Operational Improvement Review completed [...] By David Anderson | 2020-02-24T10:26:16+00:00 January 30th, 2018 | Blog , Security | Comments Off on Watching the watchers – implementation stocktake Read More Report into MI5/Police intelligence-handling reviews Gallery Report into MI5/Police intelligence-handling reviews Report into MI5/Police intelligence-handling reviews The Home Secretary has today published my report (submitted to her on 2 November) into the nine internal reviews by MI5 and Counter-Terrorism Police of their handling of intelligence prior to this year's terrorist attacks at Westminster, Manchester Arena, London Bridge and Finsbury Park.
